sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11221" key="*)apaqhnai=oi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἀπᾰθηναῖοι</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ων</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n11221.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">degenerate Athenians,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0566.tlg001:308" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theopomp.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">308</biblScope> </bibl>; censured by <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:58" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.58</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
